message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Fixing resource leak in shell completion by wrapping make_context calls with 'with' statements in _resolve_context

type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Adding validate_nesting param to Context for nested context validation (resource leak prevention)

type: INTENT
files: src/click/shell_completion.py:_resolve_context,src/click/core.py:Context
summary: I'm adding validate_nesting param to Context.__init__/close/_make_sub_context in core.py, and need _resolve_context's make_context calls to pass validate_nesting=False (ctx_args + explicit kwargs at lines ~547,560,571). Since you're restructuring _resolve_context with 'with' statements, please keep those make_context call sites explicit so I can add the kwarg, or add validate_nesting=False yourself there. Will sync before final edit to avoid clobbering.

type: STATUS
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Done: wrapped the 3 make_context calls in _resolve_context with 'with ... as ctx' statements (main ctx, sub_ctx for non-chained groups, sub_sub_ctx for chained groups) to fix resource leak; also updated Context.exit() docstring in core.py. Call sites remain explicit (cli.make_context(...), cmd.make_context(...) x2) so you can add validate_nesting=False kwargs there without conflict. No other core.py changes made.

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Done: added validate_nesting param+tracking to Context (init/close/_make_sub_context) in core.py, and set validate_nesting=False on all 3 make_context call sites in shell_completion.py _resolve_context. Full test suite passes (614 passed). Patch written to patch.txt.
